gaps.description: Keyword-derived label: thank, regarding, info, available
sample_turns: Yeah hi, I was hoping to schedule a consultation. For myself. Uh, general physician kind of thing. Aditi Wagh. W-A-G-H. It's 8800912345. Umm, can I do 10 AM? Is that still available? Yes please. No, that's great. Thanks a lot.

Good morning. I just wanted to confirm — do you have a visiting consultant system or are all your doctors full time? So how do I know when a specific doctor is available? Okay. And do doctors run on time or is there usually a long wait? That's acceptable. Good to know. Thank you.
Hello, what are your clinic timings? And do you have parking available? Oh great. And where exactly are you located? Perfect, and umm, do you have a pharmacy on site? That's very helpful, thank you.
Hello, uh, I need some help. I'm calling regarding clinic info. Thank you.
Hello, uh, I need some help. I'm calling regarding clinic info. Thank you.
Hello, uh, I need some help. I'm calling regarding clinic info. Thank you.

gaps.description: Keyword-derived label: nahi, appointment, mujhe, book
sample_turns: Hi, mujhe ek appointment chahiye. Dermatology ke liye. Rahul Patankar. Number hai 9765432100. Weekday theek hai, actually Saturday bhi chalega agar ho toh. 11:30 ho sakta hai? Nahi, bas itna hi. Thank you!

Hello, Sunrise Clinic? Mera beta hai, uske liye pediatrician appointment book karni hai. Arjun Mehta. Abhi 4 saal ka hai. Usse fever aa raha hai last 2 days se. 9890123456. Haan haan, aaj hi theek hai. Confirm kar dijiye. Nahi, shukriya.
Namaste, mujhe ENT specialist se milna hai. Appointment mil sakta hai? Deepak Shinde. 9876501234. Somvaar theek rahega. Subah ka koi slot hai? 10 baje book kar dijiye. Nahi, bahut dhanyawaad.

Hi, yeh Sunrise Clinic hai na? Main ek appointment book karna chahta hoon ophthalmology ke liye. Suresh Bhosale. Number 9823567890 hai. Kal — matlab Budhwaar — agar ho toh. Perfect, 11 AM confirm kar do. Nahi yaar, bas. Thanks!
Haan, mujhe apna appointment cancel karna hai. Kal ka tha. Rajesh Solanki. Dr. Kavitha Reddy ke saath. Kal 2 baje. Sirf cancel. Abhi schedule nahi karunga. Nahi, bas yahi chahiye tha. Dhanyawaad.
Namaste. Mujhe orthopaedic doctor se milna hai. Mere kamar mein bahut dard hai. Savitabai Jadhav. 9823001122. Kal subah theek hai. Book kar dijiye. Nahi, dhanyawaad.
Hello, uh, I need some help. I'm calling regarding insurance tpa. Thank you.
Hello, uh, I need some help. I'm calling regarding insurance tpa. Thank you.
Hello, uh, I need some help. I'm calling regarding insurance tpa. Thank you.
Hello, uh, I need some help. I'm calling regarding insurance tpa. Thank you.
Hello, uh, I need some help. I'm calling regarding insurance tpa. Thank you.
Hello, uh, I need some help. I'm calling regarding insurance tpa. Thank you.

gaps.description: Keyword-derived label: policy, your, thank, what
sample_turns: Hi, I'm calling about Medicaid... no wait, I mean Mediassist TPA. Do you work with them? That's a relief. I've been trying to find a network hospital close to Kothrud and you guys came up. What if it's an emergency? Do I still need pre-auth? Got it. Very helpful, thanks.

Hello, I want to know if you have a dedicated TPA helpdesk at the clinic. And what are their working hours? Can they help with pre-authorisation for a planned surgery? Very helpful. I'll come by Monday.

Hello. I want to know if pre-existing conditions like hypertension will be covered under cashless at your clinic. My policy is 5 years old. I'm with ICICI Lombard. And your insurance desk can help if I bring the policy documents? Thank you very much.

Hello, I wanted to check if your clinic accepts Star Health Insurance. My policy is a family floater. Oh great. And what documents do I need to carry for the cashless process? Okay, and is there any specific counter at the clinic for TPA submissions? Perfect. That answers everything, thank you.

Hello, umm, I have a mediclaim policy through my company — it's United India Insurance. Does your hospital accept it? Oh good. My policy has a sub-limit on room rent. Will that be a problem? That makes sense. And who do I contact at the clinic for the pre-auth process? Wonderful, thank you very much.

Hello, uh, I have an Arogya Sanjeevani policy. I'm not sure if you'll know it, it's a government standard health insurance. Okay, and can I use it for a planned cataract surgery? Who initiates the pre-auth? Me or the hospital? That's a big relief. Thank you for explaining clearly.

sample_turns: My name is Meera Patel. I need help with insurance tpa. Great, thank you.
Haan, My name is Aarav Joshi. I need help with insurance tpa. Great, thank you.
My name is Meera Patel. I need help with insurance tpa. Great, thank you.
My name is Nidhi Arora. I need help with insurance tpa. Great, thank you.
Haan, My name is Aarav Joshi. I need help with insurance tpa. Great, thank you.
My name is Aarav Joshi. I need help with insurance tpa. Great, thank you.

gaps.description: Keyword-derived label: bahut, shukriya, insurance, cover
sample_turns: Haan, yeh TPA ka matter hai. Meri company ka group mediclaim hai — United India Insurance. Aapke yahan cover hota hai? Haan, ek second... 0505012345678. Yeh hai. Surgery plan hai. Gallbladder ki. Doctor ne bola hai laparoscopic karna padega. Okay. Aur koi documents aur chahiye? Bahut acha, shukriya.

Hi, mere paas New India Assurance ki policy hai. Kya aap cashless dete hain unke under? Mujhe CT scan karana hai. Yeh cover hoga? Haan, mere paas hai prescription. Kab aa sakta hoon? Theek hai. Kal aata hoon. Shukriya.

Hello. I have ESI — Employee State Insurance. Kya aapka clinic ESI empanelled hai? Aur family members — wife aur bacche — bhi cover honge? IPD ke liye bhi chalega? Matlab admit karne ke liye? Bahut achha. Shukriya aapka.

Haan, namaste. Mujhe yeh jaanna tha ki kya aap log HDFC Ergo insurance accept karte ho? Aur agar mujhe surgery karwani ho toh pre-authorization kitne din pehle lena padta hai? Aur kya maternity cover bhi hota hai HDFC Ergo mein? Theek hai, bahut shukriya.

Hello, mujhe jaanna tha ki aap Star Health ka insurance accept karte ho? Oh achha. Toh main kal admit hone wala hoon, umm, knee replacement ke liye. Kya documents laane padenge? Pre-authorization kitne time mein hoti hai usually? Theek hai, mera naam Suresh Nair hai by the way. Bahut shukriya, bahut helpful tha.

Hello, mera naam Vikram Shetty hai. Main puchna chahta hoon ki Medi Assist TPA mein mere appendix ke operation ka coverage milega? Achha. Cashless milega ya reimbursement? Aur room rent ka kya — koi limit hai? Theek hai samajh gaya. Bahut helpful tha, thank you.

gaps.description: Keyword-derived label: main, mujhe, karna, nahi
sample_turns: Haan hello. Mujhe pata karna tha ki aap online payment accept karte hain ya nahi. Aur koi payment link bhej sakte hain mujhe? Bill abhi settle karna hai but main aa nahi sakta personally. Patient ID SNC-P-77432 hai. Perfect, link aa gaya toh kar dunga. Thank you.

Hi, main apna outstanding balance check karna chahta hoon. Maine jo surgery ki last month, uska poora bill clear nahi hua tha. Umesh Pawar. ID hai... SNC-P-88210. Haan, wahi. Toh kya main installment mein de sakta hoon? Theek hai. Mera number update hai na files mein? Nahi, shukriya.
Hello. Mujhe ek cheque se payment karni thi. Kya aap cheque accept karte hain? Vasant Phadke. Invoice SNC-2024-09341 hai. Main khud aakar dunga. Kal chal sakta hai? Theek hai. Shukriya.

Haan, hello. Mujhe, uh, apna bill clear karna tha. Last month mera operation hua tha aur abhi bhi outstanding hai kuch. Meera Joshi. Patient ID shayad... P-zero-zero-four-five-six hai. Can I pay by UPI? I have GPay. Done, I got the link. Paying now... okay it went through.

Hello. Mujhe yeh confirm karna tha ki mera insurance se jo amount settle hua, usske baad balance kya bacha hai mujhe pay karna. Arun Gokhale. Patient ID P-zero-zero-seven-eight-nine. Theek hai. Main UPI se pay kar sakta hoon abhi? Done, paid. Message aa gaya. Nahi, shukriya.

Hello, main puchna chahta tha ki kya aap log cash payment accept karte ho ya sirf digital hi hai? Achha. Aur kya koi surcharge hai card pe? Oh okay. Main UPI se dene ki koshish karunga. Mera naam Rithvik Nair hai, mujhe apna outstanding balance jaanna tha. 9911223344. Done, main abhi pay karta hoon.

gaps.description: Keyword-derived label: appointment, tomorrow, perfect, something
sample_turns: Hi, I want to push my appointment. Got stuck with something at home, can't make it tomorrow. Omkar Kulkarni. It was tomorrow at 11 AM with the GP. Uh, can I do this Friday? Any time in the afternoon? 4:30 PM is better. Nope, that's it. Cheers.

Hello, I have a small request. I want to change my appointment from morning to an afternoon slot if possible. Same day, same doctor. Vaibhav Kamath. I have 9 AM tomorrow with Dr. Nitin Kadam, gastroenterology. Yes! 2:30 PM is perfect. Thank you. Brilliant, thanks.

Uh, hello. I have an appointment day after tomorrow but I need to shift it to next week. Something came up at work. Nalini Krishnan. 9944332211. Umm, Monday or Tuesday, either is fine. Same time if possible. Yes, please go ahead. No, that's perfect. Thank you!

Uh, hi. I booked an appointment last week online and I want to, uh, change the timing. Not the date, just the time. Shweta Bhatt. 9823115566. Can I get something after 11? I have a school drop to manage in the morning. Yes please. Perfect, thanks so much.

Hello, I want to shift my appointment from morning to evening if possible. I have a 10 AM slot but I just got a meeting scheduled. Pooja Nambiar. Uh, Dr. Ramesh Kulkarni, the cardiologist. 6 PM is perfect actually, yes. No, that's all. You were very quick, thank you!
